acceptance.label: Live daemon validation covers an oversized-change case and a larger-fanout edit case
The remaining pathological behavior is explicitly documented with current numbers

payload.summary: Validated the large-edit follow-up on the live daemon after release rebuild and daemon restart recovery. Recent daemon-log evidence shows oversized co-change sampling is active instead of skipping, and large-file refreshes now stay on the in-place persist path with `restore_runtime_ms=0`, `reanchor_memory_ms=0`, `persist_ms` reduced into the teens-to-20s for the controlled large-file probes, and total refreshes reduced from the previous 300-400ms range to roughly 136-183ms on the targeted `crates/prism-mcp/src/tests.rs` workload. Full `cargo test --workspace` and release `mcp status`/`health` are green.
payload.title: Validate the large-edit follow-up on the live daemon log
